what_it_does: This file is a ledger metadata record for an image asset named "Screenshot 2026-05-19 145956" stored under the design-assets/infographs channel; it records the blob reference, MIME type, dimensions, provenance, versioning, and links.
observations: The asset is an image/png with dimensions recorded as 0x0.
There is exactly one version (v1) with an empty alt text field.
The source field is "dragnet" and the author_session is "ch-3mpkjg3r".
The created and updated timestamps are identical.
standouts: An image asset ledger entry with 0x0 dimensions.
Empty alt text on a visual asset.
Single version and no outgoing links.
conventions: Follows the channel-memory ledger frontmatter schema with id, address, channel, path, blob, mime, versions, timestamps, and links.
Uses blob:// URI addressing and ISO 8601 timestamps.
Breaks the usual expectation that an image record should have non-zero width and height.
concerns: Zero width and height suggest the image was not fully analyzed or ingested.
Empty alt text limits accessibility and searchability.
No links leave the asset isolated from related records.
notes: A single-version image ledger entry for a screenshot-style infographic that currently lacks dimensional and descriptive metadata.
questions: Why are the image dimensions recorded as 0x0?
What does the "dragnet" source indicate about how the image was captured?
What content is shown in the screenshot?
Why is the alt text empty?
Will additional versions or links be added later?
purpose_vs_actual: The file appears intended to catalog a screenshot asset in the design-assets channel; it succeeds as a versioned blob pointer but falls short as a complete image record because dimensions and alt text are missing.
intention_signals: The entry seems to be registering a captured screenshot infographic into the design-assets channel so it can be retrieved, versioned, and linked to other records later.
novelty: The asset name embeds a screenshot timestamp ("Screenshot 2026-05-19 145956") yet is classified as an infograph, and its dimensions are recorded as 0x0.
contribution: It contributes a versioned, blob-addressed metadata record with source and authorship provenance for a screenshot asset, which a fused system would keep as a canonical asset pointer while enriching missing dimensions and alt text.
summary_for_embedding: A channel-memory ledger metadata file for a PNG screenshot asset in design-assets/infographs with zero dimensions, empty alt text, one version, and no links.
intention_for_embedding: This file was created to register and version a screenshot infographic in the design-assets channel for later retrieval and linking.
